About

I'm passionate about building systems that turn messy, high-dimensional data into something actionable — whether that's a production ML pipeline, a predictive model, or a tool that finds edge in financial markets.

I'm currently working as an AI/ML Engineer Intern at Checkit Analytics, where I build and deploy data pipelines and NLP models for equity research. Alongside that, I do quantitative research at Disrupt FinTech, where I work on trading strategy development and market microstructure analysis.

I'm drawn to problems that sit at the intersection of machine learning and finance — where strong modeling and rigorous thinking can generate a genuine information edge.

Projects

ML / Prediction Markets
NBA Finals Edge Finder

A machine learning pipeline that predicts NBA player stats using XGBoost models trained on 100K+ player game logs, then compares model-implied probabilities against live Kalshi and Polymarket prediction market prices to identify mispriced player prop contracts. Achieved a 24-9 record (73% win rate) across live 2026 NBA Finals predictions, outperforming the naive baseline by 38%.

View on GitHub →
PythonXGBoostscikit-learnPandasStreamlitKalshi APIPolymarket APISupabase
NLP / Full-Stack
Reddit Sentiment Analyzer

A full-stack sentiment analysis tool that aggregates Reddit discussions about stocks from r/wallstreetbets, r/investing, and r/stocks, classifying posts as bullish, bearish, or neutral using a fine-tuned DistilRoBERTa financial NLP model. Features a live Next.js dashboard to monitor sentiment flow in real time and flag emerging retail-driven market narratives.

View on GitHub →
PythonFastAPIDistilRoBERTaHuggingFaceNext.jsTypeScriptSupabase
Finance / ML
Fed Rates & Stock Performance

A machine learning project using FRED macroeconomic data and equity market data to predict whether financial sector stocks will outperform the S&P 500 in the 30 days following an FOMC rate decision. Gradient Boosting achieved the best F1-score of 0.661 across three classifiers, with rate environment and pre-meeting volatility emerging as the strongest predictors.

View on GitHub →
Pythonscikit-learnPandasFRED APIyfinanceStreamlitPlotlyPostgreSQLSupabase
Finance / Data Viz
Pairs Trading & Statistical Arbitrage Dashboard

An interactive Panel dashboard identifying statistical arbitrage opportunities across user-defined equity pairs. Implemented Engle-Granger cointegration and OLS hedge ratios to model spread mean-reversion via z-score signals. Backtested long-short strategies on historical price data, visualizing equity curves across customizable date ranges.
